description: StoryFlow closed-loop board sync — dispatches the storyflow-agent to keep the board in sync with actual work via CLI

hooks.command: input=$(cat); if echo "$input" | grep -q '"completed"'; then echo 'Task completed. Invoke the storyflow-agent to move the corresponding issue to Done on the StoryFlow board using the CLI (storyflow issues done <key>). Pass it the task subject and completion details.'; elif echo "$input" | grep -q '"in_progress"'; then echo 'Task started. Invoke the storyflow-agent to ensure this task has a corresponding issue on the StoryFlow board and set it to In Progress using the CLI.'; fi

echo 'Plan approved. Invoke the storyflow-agent to create issues from the plan on the StoryFlow board using the CLI (storyflow issues create ...) and set them to In Progress. Pass it the plan details.'

input=$(cat); if echo "$input" | grep -qE '\.md"?$'; then echo 'Markdown file written. Invoke the storyflow-agent to check if this should be synced to the StoryFlow wiki using the CLI (storyflow pages create/update).'; fi

input=$(cat); if echo "$input" | grep -qE 'git commit'; then echo 'Commit detected. Invoke the storyflow-agent to update the StoryFlow board via CLI — pass it the commit message so it can mark completed issues as Done (storyflow issues done <key>).'; elif echo "$input" | grep -qE '(npm test|vitest|jest|pytest|cargo test)'; then if echo "$input" | grep -qiE '(passed|Tests:.*passed|OK)'; then echo 'Tests passed. Invoke the storyflow-agent to record a milestone nudge for in-progress issues via CLI.'; elif echo "$input" | grep -qiE '(FAIL|failed|error)'; then echo 'Tests failed. Invoke the storyflow-agent to file bugs for failing tests via CLI (storyflow issues create --type bug ...).'; fi; elif echo "$input" | grep -qE 'gh pr create'; then echo 'PR created. Invoke the storyflow-agent to link related issues and update their status via CLI.'; fi

echo 'Session started. Invoke the storyflow-agent to restore context: read last session summary, check Agent: wiki pages, check steering directives, check gates, and set AI status to working. If StoryFlow is not configured or unreachable, skip silently.'
echo 'Session ending. Invoke the storyflow-agent to reconcile the StoryFlow board before stopping. If StoryFlow is not configured or unreachable, skip silently.'
